title: zehneria pedicellata
intro: Zehneria pedicellata, also known as the Indian pennywort, is a type of perennial herb native to India and other parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, to treat various health conditions such as fever, skin diseases, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Zehneria pedicellata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Zehneria pedicellata can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, and is often used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being and vitality.
